questions.question: List any five Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) with their numbers.
Explain the difference between SDGs and Millennium Development Goals (MDGs).
keyPoints: MDGs had 8 goals; SDGs have 17 goals
MDGs mainly targeted developing nations; SDGs are universal for all countries
SDGs have broader scope addressing environmental and institutional aspects

questions.question: How can engineering professionals contribute to achieving SDGs?
keyPoints: Develop green technologies for clean energy
Implement waste management and recycling systems

questions.question: What is the target year for achieving all SDGs? Mention any two key features of the 2030 Agenda.
keyPoints: Two features: Universal application to all nations, Interconnected 17 goals, Integrated approach balancing social economic and environmental aspects

questions.question: Differentiate between SDG 7 and SDG 13.
keyPoints: SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy - focuses on access to sustainable energy sources
SDG 13: Climate Action - focuses on combating climate change and its impacts
SDG 7 addresses energy production and access; SDG 13 addresses climate mitigation and adaptation

questions.question: What does SDG 11 aim to achieve? List any two targets under this goal.
keyPoints: Targets: Make cities inclusive, safe, resilient and sustainable; Provide access to safe and affordable housing; Sustainable transport systems; Reduce disaster risk

questions.question: Discuss SDG 9 (Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure) in detail. Explain its targets and how it relates to sustainable development.
keyPoints: Goal: Build resilient infrastructure, promote inclusive and sustainable industrialization, foster innovation
Targets: Develop quality reliable sustainable infrastructure, promote inclusive industrialization, increase access to financial services, upgrade technology
Relation to sustainable development: Infrastructure supports economic growth, innovation drives efficiency, sustainable industrialization creates green jobs
Possible actions: Invest in renewable energy infrastructure, promote research and development, adopt circular economy principles, support SMEs

questions.question: Explain any five SDGs with their primary targets. Also discuss how these goals are interconnected.
keyPoints: 2. Zero Hunger - End hunger achieve food security
4. Clean Water - Water and sanitation for all
- All goals are interdependent like a web

questions.question: What is the role of partnerships in achieving SDGs? Discuss SDG 17 in detail with its targets and possible actions.
keyPoints: - Assist developing countries achieve long-term debt sustainability

questions.question: Discuss SDG 12 (Responsible Consumption and Production) and SDG 13 (Climate Action). How are they related and what actions can be taken?
keyPoints: - Ensure sustainable consumption and production patterns
- Targets: Sustainable management of natural resources, Reduce waste generation, Sustainable procurement policies
- Take urgent action to combat climate change
- Targets: Strengthen resilience to climate-related hazards, Integrate climate measures into policies
- SDG 12 supports climate mitigation through reduced emissions
